title: Aurora, 32117, Triceratops Dinosaur, 13In, Soft Toy, Purple
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: • A cuddlesome, soft exterior with squeezable plush filling
• All children love this cute, colourful and collectable character
• European safety standards met and carries the CE label therefore safe for children
• Made only from the best and softest plush materials
• Aurora World is the leading supplier of affordable, high quality gift products
description: Product Description This take on the famous Triceratops is a must-have for any would-be Dinosaur lovers out there. He is soft and cuddly and is a great way to get children to ask questions about dinosaurs and encourage learning. Triceratops is a purple patterned plush bodied dinosaur, with a cream plush material for his tummy and legs. If your child loves dinosaurs then this can be a fine gift to give them, opening up an ability to truly appreciate their friends from a different era. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains Aurora World 32117 Triceratops 13in
